commands: export PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin:$PATH; uname=$(uname -s -v -n -m 2>/dev/null); arch=$(uname -m 2>/dev/null); uptime=$(cat /proc/uptime 2>/dev/null | cut -d. -f1); cpus=$( (nproc 2>/dev/null || /usr/bin/nproc 2>/dev/null || grep -c "^processor" /proc/cpuinfo 2>/dev/null) | head -1); cpu_model=$( (grep -m1 -E "model name|Hardware" /proc/cpuinfo | cut -d: -f2- | sed 's/^ *//;s/ *$//' ; lscpu 2>/dev/null | awk -F: '/Model name/ {gsub(/^ +| +$/,"",$2); print $2; exit}' ;
